The resource string "wizard_welcome_title" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "el" (Greek) here
The resource string "wizard_welcome_title" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "ru" (Russian) here
The resource string "wizard_welcome_title" has been marked as translatable="false" elsewhere (usually in the `values` folder), but is translated to "tr" (Turkish) here
Formatting %d followed by words ("saved"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("time"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is never < 26
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Very long vector path (904 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?attr/selectableItemBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.EVTracker.SplashScreen`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?attr/colorSurface` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.EVTracker.SplashScreen`)

issue.message: Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
